semantic.role: Demonstration and validation document for the ArchSpine protocol
responsibilities: Explaining the purpose of the archspine-demo project
Describing architecture highlights including DDD separation and boundary enforcement
Illustrating how ArchSpine's rule checking and local control plane work

English.purpose: This document introduces the archspine-demo project, a minimal demonstration designed to showcase the core capabilities of the ArchSpine protocol. It serves as a practical example for understanding how ArchSpine enforces architectural boundaries and manages semantic context within a local repository.
English.context_and_audience: The intended audience includes developers, architects, and technical evaluators who want to see a concrete, small-scale implementation of ArchSpine's features. It is particularly useful for those exploring domain-driven design patterns and architectural rule enforcement in a hands-on manner.
key_takeaways: The project separates domain logic from infrastructure using Domain-Driven Design principles.
Intentional architectural violations are included to demonstrate ArchSpine's rule checking capabilities.
The .spine/ directory stores semantic context locally, illustrating the Local Control Plane concept.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档介绍了 archspine-demo 项目，这是一个最小化的演示项目，旨在展示 ArchSpine 协议的核心功能。它作为一个实际示例，帮助理解 ArchSpine 如何强制执行架构边界并在本地仓库中管理语义上下文。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 目标读者包括开发者、架构师和技术评估人员，他们希望看到一个具体的小规模 ArchSpine 功能实现。对于希望通过动手实践探索领域驱动设计模式和架构规则执行的人来说，本文档尤其有用。
key_takeaways: 该项目使用领域驱动设计原则将领域逻辑与基础设施分离。
项目中包含了有意的架构违规，以演示 ArchSpine 的规则检查能力。
.spine/ 目录在本地存储语义上下文，展示了本地控制平面的概念。
